HomePage.heroDesc: Gravia learns your brand tone and auto-generates optimal captions, hashtags, and CTAs. Schedule with just one click.

aiCaption.title: AI Caption Generation
aiCaption.desc: AI learns your brand voice, tone, and CTA to instantly generate high-engagement captions.

autoPost.title: Optimal Auto-Posting
autoPost.desc: Set recommended posting times per project. Schedule with one click and let Gravia handle the rest.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.desc: Track reach, saves, and engagement in real-time. Drive growth strategies based on data.

workflow.title: Workflow Management
workflow.desc: Manage drafts, scheduled, and published posts in one screen. Grasp team progress at a glance.

projects.title: Project Settings
projects.desc: Manage multiple brands by project. Preset tone, CTAs, and hashtags to boost efficiency.

api.title: Official Meta API
api.desc: Uses only official APIs. Guaranteed account safety and full compliance with terms of service.

HomePage.footerDesc: Automate Instagram with AI. Easier, Better, Faster.

s1.title: 1. Information Collection
s1.desc: When you use our service to automate Instagram posts, we collect:
s1.p2: Social Media Data: Access tokens needed to publish posts, get profile info, and read metrics when you connect Facebook/Instagram.
s1.p3: Usage Data: Info on platform usage including schedules and published posts.

s2.title: 2. Use of Information
s2.p1: Providing, maintaining, and improving the service.
s2.p2: Account authentication and Meta API integration.
s2.p3: Scheduling and auto-publishing social media content.
s2.p4: Contact regarding updates, support, and notifications.

s3.title: 3. Information Sharing
s3.p1: This app integrates with Facebook/Instagram via Meta Graph API. By using this service, you agree to their privacy policies.
s3.p2: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We only share with trusted providers supporting our app under confidentiality agreements.

s4.title: 4. Data Retention & Deletion
s4.p1: We retain your information and tokens only as long as necessary to provide the service. You can revoke access at any time by disconnecting your account from the dashboard.
s4.p2: Contact us if you wish to fully delete your account and all associated data.

s5.title: 5. Security
s5.p1: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal info and access tokens from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

s6.title: 6. Policy Changes
s6.p1: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new policy here and updating the Last Updated date.

s7.title: 7. Contact Us
s7.p1: If you have any questions or concerns about this policy, please feel free to contact support.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.p1: By using this Instagram automation tool, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you are not authorized to use the service.

s2.title: 2. Accounts and Links
s2.p1: When creating an account and connecting your Facebook/Instagram profiles, you warrant that you have the right and authority to grant access. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and activities under your account.

s3.title: 3. Use of Meta API
s3.p1: This app uses the Meta Graph API. By using our service, you also agree to comply with Facebook and Instagram Terms and Community Guidelines. Using this tool for spam, inappropriate, or illegal content may result in immediate suspension and a ban from Meta platforms.

s4.title: 4. Service Reliability
s4.p1: We do our best to publish your posts on time. However, our service relies on third-party APIs (Meta) and we cannot be held liable for publishing failures, API rate limits, token revocations, or downtime caused by external factors.

s5.title: 5. Termination
s5.p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

s6.title: 6. Modifications
s6.p1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. By continuing to access our service after revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

s7.title: 7. Contact Us
s7.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms, please feel free to contact us.

s1.title: How to delete your data
s1.p1: If you have connected your Facebook or Instagram account to Gravia and wish to have all your data deleted, follow these steps:

s2.title: What data we delete
s2.l1: Your connected Instagram / Facebook account tokens
s2.l2: All posts, schedules, and drafts created in Gravia

s3.title: Request deletion directly
s3.p1: You can also email us directly to request full data deletion. We will confirm deletion within 30 days.
